title: Oliveboard is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Oliveboard is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!
